name: cnvtr
description: Convert public media URLs to high-quality audio (MP3, WAV) for creators, DJs, and producers
author: CNVTR

scripts.build: npm run bundle:deps && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: npm run bundle:deps && vite build && electron-builder --win --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.build:mac: npm run bundle:deps && vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build: npm run bundle:deps && vite build && electron-builder --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
